focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella realizes the old woman is her future self in a mirror; Edward, ageless, kisses her aged hand and wishes her a happy birthday, revealing her mortal decay beside his immortality.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bella sees her aged future self in a mirror and confronts the reality of her mortality alongside Edward's unchanging youth.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: understanding the cost of loving an immortal
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: shocked and disturbed by the vision of her aged self and the irreversible passage of time
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: how to reconcile her finite human life with her love for an ageless Edward
evidence_quotes: Bella SEES -- ACROSS THE MEADOW -- AN OLD WOMAN, white hair framing her withered face.
she recognizes -- BELLA ... Gran?
With growing horror, Bella reaches out to Gran... and touches glass!
Oh my God. -- as she realizes that's not Gran; it's Bella, sixty-five years older.

relation_updates: emotional distance highlighted with Edward due to time disparity
status_updates: faces irreversible aging while Edward remains unchanged
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bella's fear of becoming obsolete as she ages while Edward remains young

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 7、INT. FORKS HIGH SCHOOL - ENGLISH CLASS - DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward reveals he once considered provoking the Volturi to die if Bella had died, explaining a vampire's way to end immortality, while deflecting classroom attention with a Shakespeare quote.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Edward reveals depth of his emotional dependence on Bella
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward confesses he considered provoking the Volturi to end his life if Bella had died during James's attack, revealing his extreme emotional vulnerability.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Edward processes past trauma; Bella grapples with the weight of his devotion.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella shifts from amusement to deep concern about Edward's mental state.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Edward's willingness to die for her creates emotional burden
evidence_quotes: I would have gone to Italy, provoked the Volturi...
Bella is too concerned to be amused.

relation_updates: Edward's love is revealed as life-or-death
status_updates: Bella learns the full extent of Edward's suicidal thoughts
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bella's role as emotional anchor for Edward

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward refuses to visit Bella, but shares an intense, emotional kiss with her on her birthday, then leaves abruptly into the night, suggesting finality.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: emotional climax and turning point in relationship
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward refuses to return to Bella, shares a final intense kiss at her request, and leaves abruptly, signaling a possible end to their relationship.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Bella pleads for emotional connection; Edward resists but briefly relents before withdrawing completely.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella is left alone and emotionally shattered after Edward's departure.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: It is unclear whether Edward's departure is permanent or temporary.
evidence_quotes: I won't be coming back. Not tonight.
Then... can I ask for one thing? It's still my birthday. (off his nod) Kiss me?
Abruptly, he pulls away. With a last look, he turns walks off into the night.

relation_updates: Edward emotionally distances and implies finality in his departure
status_updates: Edward declares he won't return, creating separation
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bella's fear of abandonment and emotional dependence on Edward

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella, terrified, drags herself to a cluster of trees, squeezes between them, and closes her eyes, breathing hard as she tries to disappear.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward ends his relationship with Bella, telling her she is not good for him, and leaves her alone in the woods, where she collapses physically and emotionally.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Bella wants to stay with Edward
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella is lying on the forest floor, unresponsive to search calls, numb and immobile as rain falls and a threatening animal approaches
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bella's immediate safety and ability to recover from emotional shock are uncertain
evidence_quotes: You're not good for me, Bella.
She remains on the ground. Curls into a ball. Darkness shrouding her. Devastation paralyzing her.
ECU ON HER FACE - numb. HEAR the faint sound of her name being called in the distance. A search party. She's too wrecked to respond.
Rain begins to pour; she doesn't register it....

relation_updates: Edward ends romantic relationship with Bella
Bella feels rejected and emotionally shattered
status_updates: Bella becomes isolated and physically collapsed in the forest
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bella's collapse after emotional rejection

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella grieves deeply after a loss, expressing emotional pain through a letter while scenes show her in distress, clinging to the pain as a reminder of those she lost, especially Alice, as classmates observe her isolation.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: grieving and isolating after the departure of the Cullens
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bella expresses that her emotional pain serves as the only proof that Edward and the Cullens were real, choosing to hold onto suffering as a way to preserve their memory.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella is emotionally withdrawn, avoiding social interaction and showing visible signs of distress at home and school.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: inability to process or move forward from the loss of the Cullens
evidence_quotes: It's like a huge hole has been punched through my chest...
But the pain is my only reminder that he was real... that they all were...
I miss them. Especially Alice...
Bella sits on the couch, blank, as the rain pounds.

relation_updates: intensified emotional attachment to Alice and Edward despite separation
status_updates: increased isolation
visible deterioration in emotional and physical state
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bella equates enduring pain with maintaining love and connection

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella, undeterred by Jessica's anger, remains fixated on seeing Edward again, embracing danger as a means to encounter him despite knowing he may not be real.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bella deliberately approaches strangers on motorcycles, testing whether danger will trigger visions of Edward and defying the apparition's warnings.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to see Edward, even if only as a hallucination
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella chooses to ignore Edward's apparition and rides with a stranger, confirming her willingness to endanger herself for a vision
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: her safety and mental stability are at risk
evidence_quotes: BACK ON BELLA, a chill going down her spine, FREEZING her as she stares at the foursome across the street...
She stops. EDWARD Turn around, Bella. This is dangerous.
Bella looks at him with determination -- then climbs on to the back of the bike -- BELLA I can break promises, too.

relation_updates: Edward (apparition) - defiance replaces obedience
Jessica - growing emotional distance
status_updates: engages in life-threatening risk
acknowledges Edward is not real but acts anyway
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bella's use of self-endangerment as emotional sustenance

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella removes her clothes, ignores Edward's warning apparition, leaps from the cliff with exhilaration, and plunges into the rough waters below.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bella jumps from a cliff after deliberately removing her clothes and ignoring environmental hazards, using the act of physical risk to bring back an apparition of Edward.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: provoke Edward's apparition through risk
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: experiences exhilaration during the fall
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: dependency on Edward for emotional validation
evidence_quotes: Ignoring the wind and rain, she strides to the cliff's edge;
Bella smiles, tears of relief springing to her eyes.
She turns to find Edward's apparition at her side.
ON BELLA SCREAMING with exhilaration as she plummets down, down...SPLASHES into the water.

relation_updates: instrumental use of Edward's memory
status_updates: engages in life-threatening behavior
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bella's equating of risk with emotional connection

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella learns from Alice that Edward, believing her dead, is heading to the Volturi to die; flashcuts reveal the Volturi's deadly power as Bella realizes Edward made the call.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bella learns Edward, believing her dead, is traveling to the Volturi to die, which triggers her immediate determination to stop him.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Bella must reach Italy before Edward provokes the Volturi in order to save his life.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella resolves to go to Italy to prevent Edward from being killed by the Volturi.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: There is limited time to reach Edward before he confronts the Volturi.
evidence_quotes: Alice whispers Edward’s name.
When pressed, she reveals that she just saw him in a vision—he believes Bella is dead.
The realization hits Bella: it was Edward who called, not Carlisle.
Alice warns urgently that Edward is on his way to Italy, to the Volturi, to seek death.

relation_updates: Bella's understanding of Edward's emotional dependence on her becomes fully clear
status_updates: Bella shifts from passive grief to urgent mission
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bella's shift from passive grief to active intervention

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Alice arrives with airline tickets, sparking tension with Jacob over taking Bella to the Volturi; Bella intervenes and decides to go.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bella decides to travel to Italy to stop Edward from confronting the Volturi, overriding Jacob's objections and asserting her intent to act independently.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to reach Edward and prevent his suicide by proving she is alive
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: resolved to leave immediately for Italy, prioritizing Edward's immediate danger over Jacob's concerns or her own safety
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: risk of death at the hands of the Volturi
evidence_quotes: He won't believe Alice. He has to see that I'm alive.
But I still love him, and I'm not gonna let him kill himself out of guilt.
I'm eighteen, legally free to go. I'll leave a note.
Let's go.

relation_updates: tension escalates with Jacob due to her loyalty to Edward
reaffirms emotional distance from Jacob despite his feelings
status_updates: commits to international travel to confront the Volturi
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bella's assertion of autonomy in life-or-death decisions

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward, Bella, and Alice are confronted by Jane and the Volturi guards; Jane demands they follow her, instilling fear, and Edward complies, taking Bella's hand as they obey.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: emotional reunion and confrontation with authority
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bella physically stops Edward from stepping into sunlight, convincing him she is alive, and reestablishes their connection before the Volturi intervene.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: survive and stay with Edward
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: reunited with Edward but immediately placed under Volturi escort
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Volturi demands compliance and asserts control over the group
evidence_quotes: BELLA SLAMS into him - it's like running into a brick wall
He begins to realize... she is real.
He suddenly kisses her, stepping back into the shade with her.
he stiffens -- and abruptly PUSHES Bella behind him, taking a protective stance

relation_updates: reunites emotionally with Edward
fears Jane and the Volturi
status_updates: physically intervenes to stop Edward from dying
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bella's role as Edward's emotional anchor and protector

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward returns after Charlie leaves; they reconcile, but disagree on Bella becoming a vampire, with Bella asserting her choice in the matter.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bella reconciles with Edward emotionally but insists she has the right to decide about her transformation, challenging his authority over the decision.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Bella wants to become a vampire; Edward resists to protect her humanity.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella and Edward are reunited but in disagreement about her becoming a vampire.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether and how Bella will be turned remains unresolved, with Edward opposing and Bella asserting control.
evidence_quotes: BELLA You're not the only one with a say in it.
BELLA I really do.
EDWARD Just? You really don't understand what you'd be giving up.

relation_updates: Bella and Edward reconcile emotionally but reach an impasse on her transformation
Bella establishes herself as an equal decision-maker in the relationship
status_updates: Bella moves from emotional vulnerability to firm self-assertion
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bella's insistence on having a say in her own transformation

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella faces looming threats from the Volturi and Victoria, but chooses to become a vampire to stay with Edward, embracing their fate together despite Jacob's anguish.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: defiance of external control and protection of choice
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bella interrupts a physical confrontation between Edward and Jacob, placing herself between them and declaring she will not allow the fight to proceed without going through her, asserting her autonomy over her transformation.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Bella is committed to becoming a vampire regardless of opposition
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Edward and Jacob cease their confrontation, acknowledging Bella's decisive intervention and her authority over her own fate
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The Volturi and Victoria remain external threats
evidence_quotes: BELLA (realizing) But... if I choose it, it's none of your business.
But Bella races between them, forceful, insistent. BELLA (to both of them) You do this, you'll be going through me.

relation_updates: Bella definitively rejects Jacob's claim over her life
Bella positions herself as the authority between Edward and Jacob
status_updates: Bella is recognized as the central decision-maker in the conflict
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Bella as the sovereign agent of her own destiny

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Bella Swan's journey centers on her emotional and existential struggle between mortality and immortality, love and loss. She moves from passive grief after Edward's departure to active agency in pursuing him and demanding her transformation. Her development is marked by escalating risk-taking, psychological collapse, and eventual self-assertion, culminating in her definitive choice to become a vampire despite opposition from both Jacob and Edward.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella realizes the old woman is her future self in a mirror; Edward, ageless, kisses her aged hand and wishes her a happy birthday, revealing her mortal decay beside his immortality.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward participates in a vision where he interacts with an aged Bella in a mirror, kissing her hand and wishing her a happy birthday, underscoring the contrast between his unchanging youth and her human aging.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Edward remains physically unchanged while Bella confronts her future mortality, reinforcing the emotional disparity between them.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bella's finite lifespan continues to contrast with Edward's immortality, creating ongoing tension in their relationship.
evidence_quotes: Edward just smiles and steps into the sunlight.
Sunbeams SHATTER off his skin like a thousand rainbow shards
He takes her now WRINKLED, age-spotted hand. Kisses it.
Then he leans in very close to her 83-YEAR-OLD FACE and whispers into her ear -- EDWARD Happy birthday.

relation_updates: reinforces emotional bond with Bella through enduring presence
status_updates: remains ageless while Bella visibly ages
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Edward as a sorrowful yet constant immortal figure

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 5、EXT. FORKS HIGH SCHOOL - PARKING LOT - DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward questions Jacob giving Bella a gift, resentful of their connection; Bella defends Jacob as a friend, while Edward struggles to ignore his thoughts, exchanging tense looks with Jacob.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward reacts with irritation upon hearing Jacob's thoughts and witnessing him give Bella a birthday gift, signaling discomfort with Jacob's closeness to her.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: assert exclusivity in relationship with Bella
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Edward becomes visibly tense and withdrawn after Jacob presents the dreamcatcher, marking a clear moment of jealousy and perceived threat.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Edward struggles to accept Bella's friendship with Jacob without interpreting it as a personal challenge.
evidence_quotes: EDWARD Someone wants you.
He nods to Edward, who moves off to the side but eyes them.
BELLA This, I need. It's great.

relation_updates: tension escalates with Jacob
defensive dynamic emerges in relationship with Bella
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Edward as possessive and emotionally reactive partner

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 7、INT. FORKS HIGH SCHOOL - ENGLISH CLASS - DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward reveals he once considered provoking the Volturi to die if Bella had died, explaining a vampire's way to end immortality, while deflecting classroom attention with a Shakespeare quote.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward reveals he considered provoking the Volturi to end his life if Bella had died during her encounter with James, exposing his emotional reliance on her survival.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: protect Bella at all costs; accept self-destruction as consequence of her loss
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella becomes aware of Edward's extreme emotional response to the threat of losing her
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bella's concern that her safety is tied to Edward's psychological stability
evidence_quotes: I would have gone to Italy, provoked the Volturi...

relation_updates: Bella Swan: learns of Edward's suicidal contingency plan, deepening emotional bond and concern
status_updates: emotional vulnerability revealed
self-destructive impulse acknowledged
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Edward as existentially dependent on Bella

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 12、INT. CULLEN HOUSE - SECOND FLOOR LANDING - NIGHT
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward hesitates to touch Bella due to her blood; Carlisle takes her to stitch her arm while Edward, anguished, stays behind to check on Jasper, torn by his conflicting emotions.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward physically shields Bella from Jasper's attack after her blood is exposed, intervening to stop the threat.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: protect Bella at all costs
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella is unharmed but injured from broken glass; Edward remains on edge due to the presence of her blood.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Edward's ability to control his own instincts around Bella's blood
evidence_quotes: Edward FLINGS Bella behind his own body, causing her to CRASH into the table, plates shattering as --
-- Jasper SLAMS into Edward; sounds like boulders colliding.
Edward pushes him, hard; Jasper SAILS backward, hitting the wall.

relation_updates: reinforces protective bond with Bella
reveals tension with Jasper's instability
status_updates: demonstrates physical dominance over other vampires
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Edward as instinctively protective yet dangerous

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Carlisle and Bella agree he's not damned, but Edward believes vampires have no afterlife and would risk damning her, which is why he resists turning her.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Bella learns Edward refuses to turn her because he believes vampires have no souls and would risk damning her.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: preserve Bella's soul by denying her transformation
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella understands Edward's refusal is rooted in his belief that becoming a vampire would condemn her eternally
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: conflict between love and the risk of eternal damnation
evidence_quotes: He thinks we've lost our souls.
That's why he won't... He thinks he'd be damning me.
If you believed as he did, would you risk it?

relation_updates: reveals depth of Edward's ethical concern for Bella
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Edward as morally conflicted guardian

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward refuses to visit Bella, but shares an intense, emotional kiss with her on her birthday, then leaves abruptly into the night, suggesting finality.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: emotional climax and turning point in Edward and Bella's relationship
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward refuses Bella's request for a final kiss as a birthday gesture, then shares an intense kiss before abruptly leaving, indicating his decision to end their relationship.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to protect Bella from the moral and physical dangers of his vampire nature
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Edward resolves to end his romantic relationship with Bella and physically departs from her presence
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bella's desire to become a vampire conflicts with Edward's moral objections and fear for her safety
evidence_quotes: That's your solution? My ending your life?
You should go in. It's late.
I won't be coming back. Not tonight.

relation_updates: emotional distance introduced in romantic relationship
Edward initiates de-escalation of physical intimacy
status_updates: Edward decides to leave Bella
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Edward as self-sacrificing lover

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward, in anguish on a mountaintop, runs and leaps across a ravine, landing violently; the scene shifts to Bella typing, reflecting time's passage and emotional pain.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward attempts to escape emotional pain through physical exertion and dangerous action, showing his ongoing inner turmoil.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to be alone and numb to the pain of separation
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Edward remains consumed by grief, using intense physical movement to avoid confronting his emotions
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Edward has not found peace or resolution through isolation
evidence_quotes: Standing still, face agonized.
he starts running, like he's trying to outrun his memories, faster and faster
he races toward a CLIFF; a RAVINE hundreds of feet below
he LEAPS off the cliff, FLOATING, but the pain stays with him

relation_updates: Edward's bond with Bella persists as a source of anguish
status_updates: Edward in self-imposed isolation, engaging in self-destructive behavior
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Edward as tormented and isolated

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella learns from Alice that Edward, believing her dead, is heading to the Volturi to die; flashcuts reveal the Volturi's deadly power as Bella realizes Edward made the call.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward, believing Bella is dead, travels to the Volturi to provoke his own death, demonstrating his inability to continue without her.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to end his life due to the belief that Bella is dead
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Edward is en route to the Volturi to seek death
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bella is alive but has no way to stop Edward in time
evidence_quotes: Alice whispers Edward’s name.
Alice warns urgently that Edward is on his way to Italy, to the Volturi, to seek death.

relation_updates: Edward's bond with Bella becomes a driver of self-destructive action
status_updates: Edward is in a state of emotional crisis
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Edward as self-destructive in grief

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward confronts the Volturi leaders, who refuse to end his life but offer him a place due to his valuable gifts; sensing their calculation, Edward decides to give them cause to act.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: The Volturi refuse to kill Edward because of his valuable gifts and instead offer him a place among them; sensing their refusal is conditional, Edward decides to provoke them by giving them cause to act.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to force the Volturi to kill him by provoking them
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Edward leaves the chamber with the intent to incite the Volturi into taking action against him
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The method and outcome of his provocation remain uncertain
evidence_quotes: EDWARD: So you won't end this.
MARCUS: Not without cause.
Clearly, he's going to give them cause. He strides out.

relation_updates: Edward's relationship with the Volturi becomes adversarial
status_updates: Edward transitions from resignation to calculated resistance
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Edward as defiant in the face of futility

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward, Bella, and Alice are confronted by Jane and the Volturi guards; Jane demands they follow her, instilling fear, and Edward complies, taking Bella's hand as they obey.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Edward's suicide attempt and emotional reunion with Bella
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward attempts to walk into sunlight, believing Bella is dead, but is stopped by her arrival; he realizes she is alive and immediately shifts to protecting her.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Edward shifts from seeking death to protecting Bella.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Edward is emotionally restored and takes a protective stance over Bella upon the Volturi's arrival.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How Edward will protect Bella from the Volturi.
evidence_quotes: as he unbuttons his shirt, exposing his bare chest
Edward takes a step into the sunlight, the rays hitting his shoe
BELLA SLAMS into him - it's like running into a brick wall
He begins to realize... she is real.

relation_updates: Edward and Bella reunite emotionally
Edward becomes protective of Bella
status_updates: Edward abandons suicide
Edward recommits to survival
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Edward as reborn through Bella's survival

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Alice reveals she will transform Bella, urging secrecy to avoid her father's suspicion; Aro, intrigued, accepts after witnessing her vision, halting immediate conflict.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward physically intervenes to shield Bella from Jane's power and later tackles Felix when he moves to seize her, enduring severe physical retaliation.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: prevent Bella's exposure and protect her from Volturi harm
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: injured and overpowered, but still conscious and defiant after attacking Felix and enduring Jane's torture
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bella's mortal status remains a threat to their safety
evidence_quotes: Jane instead focuses her gaze on Edward which FLINGS him across the room where he collapses, writhing in agony.
Bella and Alice rush to his side.
he only takes a step before Edward tackles him.
-- Edward is fast, anticipating Felix's moves before he makes them, but Felix is stronger --

relation_updates: adversarial with Volturi enforcers
reinforced protective bond with Bella
status_updates: injured in combat
directly challenged Volturi authority
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Edward as physically defiant protector

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward returns after Charlie leaves; they reconcile, but disagree on Bella becoming a vampire, with Bella asserting her choice in the matter.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: emotional reconciliation and conflict over transformation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Edward confesses he cannot live without Bella and asks for her forgiveness, reaffirming his love while opposing her transformation into a vampire.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to regain Bella's trust and prevent her transformation
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: reunited but in disagreement over Bella's desire to become a vampire
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bella's decision to become a vampire
evidence_quotes: EDWARD Will you? I don't deserve it but... I hope you will. Because I honestly have no idea how to live without you.
EDWARD Bella. The only reason I left was to protect you. I wanted you to have a chance at a normal, happy life.
BELLA You're not the only one with a say in it.
EDWARD She won't have to. There are ways to keep the Volturi in the dark.

relation_updates: reaffirms bond with Bella after separation
conflict with Bella over her choice to become a vampire
status_updates: emotionally vulnerable
admits dependence on Bella

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Edward's arc centers on the tension between his love for Bella and the existential dangers it poses—both to her life and his moral integrity. He oscillates between protective devotion and self-destructive withdrawal, ultimately confronting his inability to live without her when he nearly sacrifices himself to the Volturi. His journey culminates in reluctant acceptance of Bella's transformation, marking a shift from resistance to commitment to their shared immortal future.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.role_in_context: introduces Jacob's emotional investment in Bella
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jacob gives Bella a dreamcatcher for her birthday, indicating his attentiveness to her well-being and personal connection.

I saw it the other day and thought of you - it catches bad dreams.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 5、EXT. FORKS HIGH SCHOOL - PARKING LOT - DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Edward questions Jacob giving Bella a gift, resentful of their connection; Bella defends Jacob as a friend, while Edward struggles to ignore his thoughts, exchanging tense looks with Jacob.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: escalates rivalry between Jacob and Edward
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jacob holds Edward's resentful gaze without speaking, maintaining his presence despite Edward's hostility.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: tense standoff established between Jacob and Edward, with unspoken conflict evident

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella smiles widely as she and Jacob unload motorcycles, laughing and reconnecting, unaware they are being watched from a distance by an unknown observer.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: marks Jacob and Bella's emotional reconnection through shared risk
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jacob agrees to help Bella repair motorcycles despite recognizing the risks, signaling his support for her defiance and their growing bond.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to rebuild something with Bella, even if it's dangerous
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jacob becomes an active participant in Bella's risky project, contributing his mechanical skills and emotional support.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: their activity is being observed by an unknown person, introducing potential danger.
evidence_quotes: JACOB Scrap metal. You shouldn't have.
JACOB Me, being the mechanic-type friend?
JACOB (studying the bikes) The parts alone will be pricey.
JACOB Charlie's gonna love that.

relation_updates: Bella and Jacob deepen their emotional connection
status_updates: Jacob becomes Bella's partner in defiance
auxiliary.persona_anchor: rebellious confidant

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 40、INT. JACOB'S GARAGE - OVER THE COURSE OF SEVERAL DAYS
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella's spirits lift as Jacob's playful, affectionate presence contrasts Edward's restraint, making their time together an unexpected perk while bikes are assembled.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: providing emotional contrast to Edward through warmth and physical affection
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jacob's playful behavior and consistent physical affection improve Bella's mood during the bike assembly.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: keeping Bella engaged and happy during bike building
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella's spirits lift as a result of Jacob's presence and attentiveness
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bella remains emotionally affected by Edward, preventing full emotional detachment
evidence_quotes: Jacob clowns for Bella's amusement, pretends to skewer himself with a pipe.
He constantly touches her, playful, affectionate.
We can see her spirits beginning to lift.

relation_updates: physical affection becomes a consistent part of Jacob and Bella's interaction
status_updates: Jacob is increasingly confident in expressing warmth and touch
auxiliary.persona_anchor: source of comfort and levity

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 47、EXT. LA PUSH - CLEARING IN THE FOREST (CONTINUOUS) - DAY
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jacob feels unwell with a strange illness, not like the flu; Bella expresses concern as he appears rattled, deepening his discomfort and emotional distress.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jacob declares his loyalty to Bella and hints at deeper feelings, is rebuffed as she reaffirms their friendship without romantic change, and begins to experience a sudden, atypical physical illness.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to reassure Bella of his loyalty and express his deeper feelings
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: emotionally wounded and physically unwell with a non-flu-like illness
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: nature of Jacob's illness and its connection to his emotional state
evidence_quotes: BELLA I already do. You don't know how much. You're my best friend but... I don't think my feelings will change.
He takes this in, it's hard. A wave of something sweeps over him. He sits back. Closes his eyes, takes a breath.
JACOB No. That's not -- I just feel... weird.

relation_updates: Bella reaffirms Jacob as her best friend but rejects romantic change
emotional distance grows despite physical closeness
status_updates: Jacob shows early signs of supernatural illness distinct from human flu
auxiliary.persona_anchor: vulnerable suitor

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella confronts Jacob, who blames the Cullens for the turmoil, severs their friendship, and coldly sends her away, leaving her alone in the rain as he rejoins the others.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jacob ends his friendship with Bella, blames the Cullens for the conflict, and aligns himself with Sam's group, marking a definitive break.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Jacob cuts ties to protect himself and align with his pack
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jacob is emotionally closed off and committed to his new role.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jacob's internal struggle between loyalty and past connection remains.
evidence_quotes: JACOB tells her to go away and turns from her
Jacob’s face is hard as he refuses, shaking his head.
Jacob seethes that they started everything just by existing, calling them goddamn leeches.
He tells Bella he can’t be friends with her anymore.

relation_updates: Jacob severs friendship with Bella
Jacob shows loyalty to Sam and the group
Jacob expresses open hostility toward the Cullens
status_updates: Jacob displays physical confidence and control
Jacob is now part of a unified group at his house
auxiliary.persona_anchor: estranged protector

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 67、EXT. LA PUSH - CLEARING IN THE FOREST - NIGHT
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Paul transforms into a wolf and attacks; Jacob follows, shifting mid-leap to fight back. The two clash violently, vanishing into the woods while Bella watches, stunned, as Sam orders her to safety.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jacob shifts into a wolf to confront Paul after defending Bella, exposing the werewolf secret to her.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: defend Bella and justify her presence to the pack
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella sees Jacob transform and understands the reality of the werewolves, while Jacob and Paul disappear into the forest fighting.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: the fight between Jacob and Paul is ongoing and unresolved
evidence_quotes: Jacob moves in front of Bella protectively, facing Paul.
Bella reels as the two wolves CRASH into each other, snarling and RAMMING one another.
BACK IN THE CLEARING -- Sam starts after them, kicking off his shoes.

relation_updates: protective stance toward Bella confirmed
conflict with Paul escalates to physical confrontation
status_updates: reveals werewolf identity to Bella
enters active conflict with pack member
auxiliary.persona_anchor: protective shapeshifter

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella realizes Victoria is targeting her, not others, after Jacob reveals they chased Victoria to the border and she keeps returning, confirming the threat is personal.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Jacob explains his role as a werewolf and the nature of the threat to Bella
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jacob clarifies that werewolves kill vampires to protect humans, confirms Victoria's repeated return, and Bella realizes she is the specific target.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to make Bella understand the danger and his role in protecting her
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella recognizes that Victoria is targeting her personally, shifting her perception of the threat from general to specific
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: fear of losing control and harming others, as Sam did with Emily
evidence_quotes: We're not killing hikers. We're trying to protect them.
The only thing we do kill: Vampires.
We chased her all the way to the border the other night. But she won't stay gone. Keeps coming back -- if we knew what she was after...
I know what she wants. Me.

relation_updates: reinforces protective bond with Bella
establishes adversarial stance toward Victoria
status_updates: confirms active duty as a werewolf protector
reveals emotional burden of losing control
auxiliary.persona_anchor: duty-bound protector

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella regrets mentioning the mind reader; Jared questions if all vampires can read minds. Paul accuses her of protecting them. Jacob defends Bella as she feels hurt.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Jacob defends Bella from pack pressure
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jacob physically and verbally intervenes to stop the pack from using Bella as bait and questioning her loyalty, showing his protective stance.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to protect Bella from both physical risk and emotional harm
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bella is visibly hurt by the pack's accusations but receives direct support from Jacob, reinforcing her dependence on him.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: tension between pack strategy and personal loyalty
evidence_quotes: With stunning speed, Jacob grabs a four-pronged spading fork from some garden tools, and FLINGS it toward Jared's head
JACOB She is not bait.
JACOB Guys, back off.
Jacob looks apologetically at Bella.

relation_updates: defends Bella against pack skepticism
asserts boundary with Jared
status_updates: demonstrates readiness to confront allies for Bella's sake
auxiliary.persona_anchor: loyal defender

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jacob and Bella nearly kiss, sharing a tender moment before the phone rings; Jacob answers coldly, revealing the caller sought someone at a funeral, then the line goes dead.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jacob nearly kisses Bella, showing rekindled emotional and romantic tension, but is interrupted by a call about Edward's funeral.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: conflicted between protecting Bella and expressing his feelings
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jacob is left emotionally suspended, his attempt to reconnect with Bella halted by external news tied to the Cullens.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether he can maintain a close relationship with Bella without causing her pain
evidence_quotes: He moves back to her, looks into her eyes with sadness.
JACOB It was easier when we were both human, wasn't it?
Slowly, he starts to bend toward her lips. She doesn't pull away.

relation_updates: emotional intimacy with Bella resurfaces
tension with the Cullens reinforced
status_updates: emotional vulnerability exposed
auxiliary.persona_anchor: torn lover

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jacob pleads with Bella to stay, expressing his love; she hugs him goodbye and rushes to her car as he watches in pain.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jacob physically stops Bella to beg her to stay, expressing his love through emotion, and silently accepts her departure when she leaves.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: keep Bella safe and with him
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jacob accepts Bella's choice but is visibly heartbroken
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: how to continue protecting Bella from afar
evidence_quotes: Jacob catches Bella's arm, not hostile.
JACOB Please, Bella. Stay here. For Charlie... for me.
Bella sees the love in his eyes; this could be last time she ever sees him.
BELLA Bye, Jacob.

relation_updates: love for Bella fully revealed
relationship with Bella shifts to one of loss and resignation
status_updates: emotional defeat acknowledged
auxiliary.persona_anchor: resigned lover

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bella faces looming threats from the Volturi and Victoria, but chooses to become a vampire to stay with Edward, embracing their fate together despite Jacob's anguish.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jacob reveals the treaty clause prohibiting vampire bites on humans, reacts with rage upon learning Bella may choose to be turned, and lunges at Edward before being pushed back and phasing into a wolf.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: prevent Bella from being turned into a vampire
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: the confrontation halts when Bella positions herself between Jacob and Edward, forcing a standoff
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jacob's threat to act against Bella if she becomes a vampire remains unwithdrawn
evidence_quotes: JACOB If any of them bites a human, the truce is over. That's bite, not kill.
Jacob is horrified, starting to shake with rage. JACOB If you... what!? No. No way. I won't let you --
Jacob lunges, trying to extract Bella from him -- JACOB You don't speak for her!
Edward PUSHES Jacob away; he flies back ten feet in the air, but mid-air he PHASES INTO A WOLF!

relation_updates: relationship with Edward escalates to physical confrontation
relationship with Bella becomes emotionally desperate
status_updates: phases into a wolf during confrontation
enters combat stance against Edward
auxiliary.persona_anchor: desperate guardian

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Jacob's arc traces his evolution from a warm, protective friend to Bella into a conflicted werewolf torn between loyalty to his tribe and his deep emotional attachment to her. His feelings intensify as he becomes her emotional anchor during her depression, only to be rejected romantically, triggering his physical transformation and growing estrangement. As tensions with the Cullens escalate, Jacob aligns with his pack, defends Bella from threats, and ultimately confronts her choice to join the vampires, culminating in heartbreak and resignation.
